data.title: happyactually announces Dr. Andia Shahzadi as Chief Medical Officer and Founding Member.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Seattle, happyactually, a company specializing in wellbeing technology for life-conscious individuals, revealed the naming of Dr. Andia Shahzadi as Chief Medical Officer and Founding Member. This move underscores the company's commitment to providing evidence-based, holistic insights.

data.title: Inventor from Arkansas creates SWIFT LIFT portable bottle jack, aiming for safer and faster operation than traditional jacks.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 23, 2026, an inventor from Evening Shade, Ark., discussed the creation of the SWIFT LIFT, a new invention aimed at revolutionizing the operation of bottle jacks. The inventor stated that the inspiration behind the SWIFT LIFT was to enhance and modernize the efficiency of bottle jack operation. This innovative design presents a secure, rapid, and efficient substitute for traditional mechanical or pneumatic jacks. The new SWIFT LIFT is expected to significantly improve the speed and safety of lifting operations, offering a promising alternative for users seeking a more advanced solution.

data.title: Myanmar construction industry output contracted by 1.4% in 2025 due to material prices, labor shortage, and supply chain disruptions. Market forecasted until 2029.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Myanmar Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's listings. According to the report, the construction industry in Myanmar experienced a 1.4% contraction in real terms in 2025. This decline can be attributed to factors such as rising construction material costs, a shortage of labor, disruptions in the supply chain, and the effects of the March 2025 earthquake. The report analyzes various sectors including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets up to 2029.

data.title: Dript IV Therapy changes name to Vitaline, focusing on senior care with clinical excellence. (Total characters: 87)
data.description: In Chicago on January 23, 2026, a company known as Dript IV Therapy, specializing in clinical hydration and support services for senior living and skilled nursing facilities, revealed its new identity as Vitaline. The rebranding signifies the company's expansion and enhanced services.

data.title: GEP has been placed in the Leaders Quadrant by Gartner in 2026 for Source-to-Pay suites due to its vision and execution.
data.description: GEP has been acknowledged by Gartner as a Leader for its strong performance in terms of 'Completeness of Vision' and 'Ability to Execute'. The company, headquartered in CLARK, N.J., received this recognition on Jan. 23, 2026. GEP is known for its AI-powered procurement and supply chain software tailored for Fortune 500 and Global 2000 enterprises globally. This acknowledgment highlights the company's leading position in the industry and its commitment to delivering exceptional solutions for clients.

data.title: Darren Walker named president & CEO of Anonymous Content, whose top investor is Emerson Collective.
data.description: The production company Anonymous Content, with primary investment from Laurene Powell Jobs’s Emerson Collective, has appointed Darren Walker as its president and CEO.

data.title: Southwest Airlines to reveal Q4 & full year 2025 financials on Jan 29, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET; Bob Jordan to discuss.
data.description: Mark your calendars for Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time to catch Southwest Airlines Co.'s (NYSE: LUV) live webcast on its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025. The webcast will feature Bob Jordan, the President and Chief of the company.

data.title: Insurity launches Partner Program with 200+ partners for scalable growth in insurance industry.
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut, Insurity, a prominent provider of cloud-based software for property and casualty insurance, introduced its latest Partner Program. This initiative aims to enhance cooperation within Insurity's network of over 200 partners, encompassing system integrators, technology providers, and insurance content and service collaborators. The program offers insurers access to a diverse range of partners, strengthening their capabilities and overall offerings in the industry.

data.title: Hundreds of flights canceled as airlines prepare for powerful winter storm with frigid weather affecting entire country.
data.description: Numerous flights are being canceled by airlines over the upcoming weekend as a precaution due to freezing temperatures and icy conditions spreading throughout many regions in the country. Hundreds of flights are affected by these cancellations.

data.title: Baseten secures $300M in Series E funding, valued at $5B, with investors like CapitalG, IVP, NVIDIA, Altimeter, and more, following Series D.
data.description: A San Francisco-based company, Baseten, has successfully secured $300 million in their Series E funding round, valuing the company at $5 billion. This funding was backed by prominent investors including CapitalG, IVP, NVIDIA, Altimeter, Battery Ventures, among others. Notably, this achievement comes just three months after the company closed its Series D round.

data.title: HCLTech to acquire Finergic Solutions Pte Ltd to enhance digital transformation services for wealth management industry.
data.description: In a recent announcement from HCL Technologies, it was revealed that the company has finalized a deal to acquire Finergic Solutions Pte Ltd. The agreement outlines the acquisition of Finergic Solutions by HCLTech. The acquisition marks a significant move for HCLTech in expanding its portfolio and market presence. This development is indicative of HCLTech's strategic growth plans and commitment to enhancing its offerings. The undisclosed financial details of the deal have not been disclosed to the public yet.

data.title: Fifth Third Bank earns 5-star rating from USA Today for best customer service in financial services. Chief operating officer Jamie Leonard expresses gratitude.
data.description: A financial services company, Fifth Third (Nasdaq: FITB), based in Cincinnati, achieved a 5-star rating in the first America’s Best Customer Service for Financial Services study by USA Today. This rating positions Fifth Third among the top companies in the financial services industry for providing exceptional customer service. Jamie Leonard, the Chief Operating Officer at Fifth Third, expressed gratitude for the acknowledgment, emphasizing that such accolades are especially meaningful when they originate from customers themselves. The company's commitment to being a relationship-focused bank underscores its dedication to prioritizing customer satisfaction.
